Oak Island Money Pit: Treasure, Tunnels, and the Mystery That Refuses to End

The Oak Island Money Pit is a famous Nova Scotia mystery about a supposed buried treasure site discovered in the late eighteenth century. Later stories describe platforms, flood tunnels, strange finds, and repeated digs.

Unexplained Mysteries - Treasure Mystery - 9 min read - Updated Jul 19, 2026
Unexplained Mysteries

Phoenix Lights Mystery: Night Sky Formation, Witness Reports, and the Event That Stayed Visible

Phoenix Lights is a pre-existing Unexplained Mysteries subject built around the 1997 Arizona sky-sighting event remembered through lights, witness reports, official explanations, and continuing debate.

Unexplained Mysteries - Mass Sighting Mystery - 9 min read - Updated Jul 21, 2026
Unexplained Mysteries

Rendlesham Forest Incident: Lights, Military Witnesses, and Britain’s Famous UFO Case

The Rendlesham Forest Incident refers to reports of strange lights and encounters near RAF Woodbridge in Suffolk in December 1980. It is often called one of Britain’s best-known UFO cases because military personnel were among the witnesses.

Unexplained Mysteries - UFO Case - 9 min read - Updated Jul 19, 2026

Taos Hum Mystery: Low Sound, Witness Reports, and the Noise No One Fully Explains

The Taos Hum is a reported low sound heard by some people around Taos, New Mexico. Witnesses describe a persistent hum, drone, or vibration that not everyone can hear.
